overview.description: The BondBloxx JP Morgan USD Emerging Markets 1-10 Year Bond ETF (XEMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of USD-denominated debt issued by sovereign and quasi-sovereign issuers from emerging markets. XEMD was launched on Jun 29, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: JP Morgan EMBI Global Diversified Liquid 1-10 Y Maturity Index

data.title: ETF Edge: Managing long-term risk amid a new Fed chair nominee, jobs data and market volatility
data.text: From a new Fed chair nominee to a hard turn to risk-off trading in some parts of the market - the broader landscape is rapidly changing for ETF investors. BondBloxx ETFs co-founder Joanna Gallegos and...
